mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_processes, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'running' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as running_processes, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'suspended' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as suspended_processes, SUM(CASE WHEN blocking_session_id IS NOT NULL AND blocking_session_id > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as blocked_processes FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions s ON r.session_id = s.session_id WHERE r.session_id >= 50

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_waits, AVG(wait_time_ms) as avg_wait_time FROM sys.dm_os_wait_stats WHERE wait_type NOT IN ( 'CLR_SEMAPHORE','LAZYWRITER_SLEEP','RESOURCE_QUEUE','SLEEP_TASK', 'SLEEP_SYSTEMTASK','WAITFOR','XE_DISPATCHER_WAIT','XE_TIMER_EVENT' )

SELECT counter_name, cntr_value FROM sys.dm_os_performance_counters WHERE object_name LIKE '%SQLServer%' AND counter_name IN ( 'Batch Requests/sec', 'SQL Compilations/sec', 'SQL Re-Compilations/sec', 'Buffer cache hit ratio', 'Page life expectancy' )
SELECT (physical_memory_in_use_kb / 1024) as memory_used_mb, ((virtual_address_space_committed_kb - physical_memory_in_use_kb) / 1024) as memory_available_mb FROM sys.dm_os_process_memory
SELECT SUM(num_of_reads) as disk_reads, SUM(num_of_writes) as disk_writes FROM sys.dm_io_virtual_file_stats(NULL, NULL)
SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.dm_exec_requests WHERE session_id >= 50) as cpu_usage_percent FROM sys.dm_exec_requests WHERE session_id >= 50 AND status = 'running'
SELECT COUNT(*) as active_transactions FROM sys.dm_tran_active_transactions

SELECT TOP 100 s.session_id, s.login_name, s.host_name, s.program_name, DB_NAME(s.database_id) as database_name, s.status, ISNULL(r.command, 'sleeping') as command, ISNULL(r.cpu_time, 0) as cpu_time, ISNULL(r.reads, 0) as logical_reads, ISNULL(r.writes, 0) as writes, ISNULL(r.total_elapsed_time, 0) as elapsed_time, ISNULL(st.text, '') as last_sql_text, r.blocking_session_id, r.wait_type, r.wait_time, r.start_time FROM sys.dm_exec_sessions s LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON s.session_id = r.session_id OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) st WHERE s.is_user_process = 1 AND s.session_id >= 50 ORDER BY ISNULL(r.cpu_time, 0) DESC

SELECT TOP 100 tl.request_session_id, tl.resource_type, tl.resource_description, tl.request_mode, tl.request_status, DB_NAME(tl.resource_database_id) as database_name, CASE WHEN tl.resource_type = 'OBJECT' THEN OBJECT_NAME(tl.resource_associated_entity_id, tl.resource_database_id) ELSE NULL END as object_name, ISNULL(wt.wait_duration_ms, 0) as wait_duration_ms, ISNULL(st.text, '') as sql_text FROM sys.dm_tran_locks tl LEFT JOIN sys.dm_os_waiting_tasks wt ON tl.lock_owner_address = wt.resource_address LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON tl.request_session_id = r.session_id OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) st WHERE tl.resource_type IN ('OBJECT', 'PAGE', 'KEY', 'RID', 'DATABASE') AND tl.request_status IN ('GRANT', 'WAIT') ORDER BY ISNULL(wt.wait_duration_ms, 0) DESC

SELECT r.session_id, st.text as sql_text, st.dbid as database_id, DB_NAME(st.dbid) as database_name, r.status, r.command, r.cpu_time, r.total_elapsed_time, r.reads, r.writes FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) st WHERE r.session_id = #{sessionId}

WITH BlockingChain AS ( SELECT r.session_id, r.blocking_session_id, r.wait_type, r.wait_time, r.wait_resource, 0 as level FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r WHERE r.blocking_session_id IS NOT NULL AND r.blocking_session_id > 0 UNION ALL SELECT r2.session_id, r2.blocking_session_id, r2.wait_type, r2.wait_time, r2.wait_resource, bc.level + 1 FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r2 INNER JOIN BlockingChain bc ON r2.session_id = bc.blocking_session_id WHERE r2.blocking_session_id IS NOT NULL ) SELECT TOP 50 bc.session_id, bc.blocking_session_id, bc.wait_type, bc.wait_time, bc.wait_resource, bc.level, s.login_name, s.host_name, s.program_name, DB_NAME(s.database_id) as database_name, ISNULL(r.command, 'sleeping') as command, ISNULL(st.text, '') as sql_text FROM BlockingChain bc LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions s ON bc.session_id = s.session_id LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON bc.session_id = r.session_id OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) st ORDER BY bc.level DESC, bc.wait_time DESC

SELECT TOP 100 s.session_id, s.login_name, s.host_name, s.program_name, s.status, DB_NAME(s.database_id) as database_name, s.login_time, s.cpu_time, s.reads, s.writes, s.logical_reads, r.status as request_status, r.command, r.cpu_time as request_cpu_time, r.total_elapsed_time, r.wait_type, r.wait_time, r.blocking_session_id, ISNULL(st.text, '') as sql_text FROM sys.dm_exec_sessions s LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON s.session_id = r.session_id OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) st WHERE s.is_user_process = 1 AND s.session_id >= 50 ORDER BY s.cpu_time DESC

SELECT ISNULL(s.program_name, 'Unknown') as program_name, ISNULL(LEFT(st.text, 200), '') as sql_text, DB_NAME(s.database_id) as database_name, COUNT(*) as connection_count, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'running' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as running_count, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'sleeping' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sleeping_count, SUM(CASE WHEN r.session_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_request_count, AVG(s.cpu_time) as avg_cpu_time, SUM(s.cpu_time) as total_cpu_time, AVG(s.reads) as avg_reads, SUM(s.reads) as total_reads, AVG(s.writes) as avg_writes, SUM(s.writes) as total_writes, AVG(s.logical_reads) as avg_logical_reads, SUM(s.logical_reads) as total_logical_reads, MAX(r.cpu_time) as max_cpu_time, MAX(r.total_elapsed_time) as max_elapsed_time, MIN(s.login_time) as first_login_time, MAX(s.last_request_end_time) as last_request_time FROM sys.dm_exec_sessions s LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON s.session_id = r.session_id OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) st WHERE s.is_user_process = 1 AND s.session_id >= 50 GROUP BY s.program_name, LEFT(st.text, 200), DB_NAME(s.database_id) ORDER BY total_cpu_time DESC

SELECT TOP 10 qs.execution_count, qs.total_worker_time as total_cpu_time, qs.total_elapsed_time, qs.total_logical_reads, qs.total_logical_writes, qs.last_execution_time, st.text as sql_text, DB_NAME(st.dbid) as database_name, qs.total_worker_time / qs.execution_count as avg_cpu_time, qs.total_elapsed_time / qs.execution_count as avg_elapsed_time FROM sys.dm_exec_query_stats qs CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(qs.sql_handle) st ORDER BY qs.total_worker_time DESC
